headline: What Intercontinental Exchange (ICE)'s Planned GPU Compute and Macro Event Futures Launch Means For Shareholders
summary: In late June and early July 2026, Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. and NATIVX announced plans to launch cash-settled GPU compute futures based on the COIL Index, alongside ICE’s first futures tied to global central bank decisions and U.S. natural gas storage reports, pending regulatory approvals. By pairing AI-related compute contracts with macroeconomic event futures on the same platform, ICE is positioning its derivatives ecosystem at the intersection of digital infrastructure demand and...

headline: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Stock Could Be Fully Priced After AI Futures Push
summary: Intercontinental Exchange stock has fallen 24.7% over the past year, yet the valuation picture is mixed, with the intrinsic value estimate from the Excess Returns model sitting close to the current market price while earnings based multiples lean more expensive. Over the last 12 months, Intercontinental Exchange shares are down 24.7%, which puts recent news flow and fresh product launches under closer scrutiny from a pricing point of view. New contracts around GPU compute futures and...

headline: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Expands Its Futures Suite, Is The 30% Undervalued View Convincing?
summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) has drawn fresh attention after announcing plans with NATIVX to launch GPU compute futures tied to the COIL Index, along with new contracts linked to central bank decisions and US natural gas storage. See our latest analysis for Intercontinental Exchange. Despite the new futures launches, Intercontinental Exchange’s share price has softened, with the stock down 15.6% year to date and its 1-year total shareholder return declining 24.7%, while 3-year and 5-year...

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on Intercontinental Exchange, Lowers Price Target to $163
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Cyprys   maintains Intercontinental Exchange (NYSE:ICE) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $187 to $163.
